nodes.name: Cron — Daily Flash Prep
nodes.notes: 7 AM weekdays — runs company agent to prep Daily Flash insights.

nodes.name: Cron — Weekly Pipeline Review
nodes.notes: Monday 8 AM — weekly deal pipeline analysis.

nodes.name: Webhook — On Demand
nodes.notes: POST {task: 'string'} — Fabian triggers company agent on demand.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO agent_sessions (agent_context, trigger_type, trigger_source, model, mcp_servers_used, input_summary) VALUES ('company', $1, $2, 'claude-sonnet-4-6', ARRAY['postgres', 'zoho-crm', 'zoho-desk', 'zoho-books', 'filesystem'], $3) RETURNING id;

nodes.name: Launch Claude Code Agent
nodes.notes: Launches Claude Code in the company agent directory with its CLAUDE.md and .mcp.json. MCP servers for Zoho CRM/Desk/Books + Postgres.

parameters.query: UPDATE agent_sessions SET status = 'completed', completed_at = NOW(), output_summary = $1 WHERE id = $2;
INSERT INTO event_log (event_type, entity_type, source, metadata) VALUES ('AgentSessionCompleted', 'agent_session', 'company_agent', jsonb_build_object('session_id', $1, 'trigger', $2));

INSERT INTO health_checks (component, last_run, status, message) VALUES ('company_agent', NOW(), 'ok', $1) ON CONFLICT (component) DO UPDATE SET last_run = EXCLUDED.last_run, status = EXCLUDED.status, message = EXCLUDED.message;

meta.description: Triggers Claude Code company agent (GPX layer) on schedule (Daily Flash prep weekdays 7 AM, weekly pipeline review Monday 8 AM) or on demand via POST /webhook/agent-company. Agent runs with MCP servers for Zoho CRM/Desk/Books, Postgres, and filesystem.
